title: Foods+
description: Foods+ implements new food items to Minecraft.
body:
Foods+ implements new ways of making food.
Please note that this mod is experimental! There will be more features added soon.
**This mod is now compatible with Just Enough Items (JEI). Make sure to install JEI together with Foods+ for the best possible experience.**

# New Blocks:
- The **Mixer** can mix milk, cacao beans, chocolate and sunflowers to obtain new items. Craft the mixer with 3 stone, 2 redstone and 1 iron ingot.
- The Fruit Press can transform any sort of apples or carrots to make juice out of them. You will need to make glasses to pour the liquid in.
- The Kneading Machine transforms regular dough into dough you can bake in a furnace. Just put the dough in the first slot and select one of the different recipes.
# New Items:
- **Flour** is crafted with 6 wheat and is used for dough.
- **Butter** is obtained by mixing milk in a mixer.
- Regular **Dough** is crafted with milk, butter and flour.
- **Salt** is obtained by smelting water in a furnace.
- **Cocoa Butter** is obtained by mixing cocoa beans in a mixer.
- **Sunflower Oil** is obtained by mixing sunflowers in a mixer.
- **Chocolate** is crafted with 2 cocoa butter, cocoa beans, 1 milk bucket and 1 sugar.
- **Chocolate Sauce** is obtained by mixing chocolate in a mixer.
- By kneading dough in a kneading machine, you can make:
  - **Baguette Dough**
  - **Croissant Dough**
  - **Roll Dough**
  - **Bretzel Dough**
  - **Flatbread Dough**
- When putting one of the five doughs in a furnace you can finally make yourself your own bread. You can now enjoy your **Baguettes**, **Croissants**, **Rolls**,** Bretzels** and **Flatbread**.
- **Chocolate Dough** can be crafted with 2 regular dough and chcocolate.
- Put chocolate Dough in a furnace to make yourself a **chocolate cake**!
- You can even add chocolate sauce to make a **glazed chocolate cake**.
- Salted Potato Stripes can be obtained by crafting 2 potatoes and salt together.
- Get French Fries by putting your potato stripes in a furnace.
- Bake regular dough in a furnace to obtain Waffles.
- A baked roll can be used to craft Breadcrumbs.
- Raw Schnitzel can be crafted with breadcrums and raw meat.
- Now cook the raw Schnitzel to obtain a cooked Schnitzel!
- Noodle Dough can be crafted with oil, salt, an egg and flour.
- Just put Noodle Dough in a furnace to make Spaghetti!
- Craft Glass with a glass block.
- With the fruit press you can make:
  - Apple Juice
  - Golden Apple Juice
  - Enchanted Golden Apple Juice
  - Carrot Juice
  - Golden Carrot Juice
# Other features:
- Press L to see achievements. They can help you if you don't know how to progress.
- You can now change a villagers profession to a baker, by placing a kneading machine near a villager without profession. He will give you new secret items...
